other_observers: see above; Missy Arnold and Larry Arnold
specific_location: hole in the ice ca. 100 ft from the outlet dam at Highline State Park
description: see photos – bird had a very pale neck and head, obvious barring on back, but I have seen very pale COLO so did not consider it possible to be YBLO (my only other YBLO was much more distant, see below)Behaviors: I saw the bird several times during the period and I never saw it leave its smallish hole in the ice, other than to stick its head in the water and forage under waterCall: I never heard this bird vocalizePlumage: see attached photos
